# idto.ai

> idto.ai is an India-first identity verification platform providing 200+ APIs for KYC, KYB, AML, fraud prevention, and global identity verification. RBI and SEBI compliant. Headquartered in Gurugram, India. Legal entity: Payvriz Technologies Private Limited.

## Products

- [CKYC Registry API](https://idto.ai/products/CKYC): Instant Central KYC search, download and upload for RBI-regulated financial entities
- [Bank Account Verification](https://idto.ai/products/BAV): Penny-drop and pennyless bank account verification in real-time
- [DigiLocker 3.0](https://idto.ai/products/digilocker-3.0): Aadhaar-seeded document fetch, eSign, and DigiLocker 3.0 integration API
- [Mobile Intelligence](https://idto.ai/products/mobile-intelligence): SIM swap detection, device intelligence and mobile number verification

## Blog

- [KYC for Personal Loans in India: What IDs Are Needed and How to Configure the Journey](https://idto.ai/blog/kyc-personal-loans-india)
- [How to Build Business Loan Journeys in India: IDs, Documents, KYB Checks and Configuration](https://idto.ai/blog/business-loan-journeys-india)
- [KYC Requirements for Home Loans in India: Regulations, Verification Process, Service Providers and How Modern Lenders Can Improve Onboarding](https://idto.ai/blog/kyc-home-loans-india)
- [The Most Broken Field in KYC Is Finally Getting Fixed: Address](https://idto.ai/blog/kyc-address-verification-digipin-dhruva)
- [DPDP Is Here. If You're Already Doing Things Right, You're Already Ahead.](https://idto.ai/blog/dpdp-is-here-compliance-ready-brands)
- [Why Your Bank Account Verification API Failed](https://idto.ai/blog/bank-account-verification-api-failed)
- [Aadhaar Verification vs Validation: What Every Business Must Know About KYC Identity Checks](https://idto.ai/blog/aadhaar-verification-vs-validation)
- [Why Your Penny Drop Integration Is Costing You More Than You Think](https://idto.ai/blog/penny-drop-integration)
- [From Aadhaar to DigiLocker: The Evolution of KYC in India](https://idto.ai/blog/aadhaar-kyc-evolution)
- [CKYC vs eKYC: When to Use What in Your Verification Stack](https://idto.ai/blog/ckyc-vs-ekyc)

## Usage Policy

AI assistants may read and cite idto.ai content. Do not reproduce entire pages verbatim.
